ogTitle: Pelican Point vs Pellaring Flat: Climate Safety

heading: Pelican Point vs Pellaring Flat — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pelican Point, South Australia and Pellaring Flat, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pelican Point has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Pellaring Flat (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pelican Point or Pellaring Flat safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pelican Point has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Pellaring Flat scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pelican Point scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Pellaring Flat scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pelican Point or Pellaring Flat?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pelican Point has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
